purchase_context: Her child's school requested a dedicated charger to stay in their backpack.
primary_use_case: Backup charger for a child's school bag
features_to_avoid: fast charging claims that seem exaggerated
prior_experience: Has bought cheap chargers before that frayed quickly
one_paragraph_description: A parent of a middle schooler who needs a reliable but affordable charger to leave in a backpack. She’s wary of very cheap options after past breakages but doesn’t want to overspend since kids tend to lose things. She values durability and safety over speed or brand name.

purchase_context: He forgot to pack a charger while traveling for a wedding and needs one immediately.
prior_experience: Uses mid-range accessories but doesn’t research deeply
one_paragraph_description: A young professional caught without a charger during a busy travel weekend. He needs something quickly from a nearby store that works reliably with his phone and charges reasonably fast. Convenience matters more than perfect specs, but he avoids anything that looks flimsy.

purchase_context: Her old charger stopped working and she needs a simple replacement.
brand_preference: prefers well-known brands like Apple or Samsung
prior_experience: Has only used the charger that came with her phone
one_paragraph_description: An older adult who wants a straightforward, dependable charger without confusing features. She values ease of use and trusts recognizable brands, even if they cost more. She is cautious about compatibility and prefers something that just works every time.

purchase_context: He is outfitting a small office with shared charging stations.
prior_experience: Has purchased office electronics but not chargers in bulk
one_paragraph_description: An office manager responsible for keeping shared spaces functional and safe. He needs chargers that can handle multiple devices without causing clutter or safety concerns. Reliability and durability matter more than cutting costs to the lowest possible level.

purchase_context: Her dorm room needs a longer charger to reach from bed to outlet.

prior_experience: Mostly uses whatever is cheapest online
one_paragraph_description: A college student who prioritizes convenience and affordability. She mainly wants a charger that reaches comfortably while using her phone in bed. She’s willing to take some risk on lesser-known brands if the price is right.

prior_experience: No prior experience with smartphone accessories
one_paragraph_description: A late adopter to smartphones who wants something simple and dependable. He is unsure about technical specs and prefers guidance from sales staff or packaging. He is willing to pay a bit more to avoid making a mistake.

purchase_context: She is buying a small add-on gift to accompany a new phone for her partner.

one_paragraph_description: A thoughtful gift buyer who wants something that feels a bit more premium than a standard charger. She cares about aesthetics and presentation as well as performance. Price matters less than giving something that looks intentional and useful.
